findings.issue: The phrase “singles e^x out among all exponential functions” is a bit broader than the surrounding mathematics justifies unless “exponential functions” means only pure bases b^x.
findings.evidence: “This self-replicating property is exactly what singles e^{x} out among all exponential functions...”
findings.suggestion: For precision, say it singles out base e among functions of the form b^x.

summary: No blocking findings. The draft is mathematically aligned with the seed, preserves the mandated proof order and examples, and does not include any brief-forbidden expansion.
